expectations.text: spline_data_element_created: A data_element create spline command defines the X stiffness table
general_force_used: force create direct general_force is used for the X-direction force
akispl_in_x_force_function: x_force_function uses AKISPL() to look up force from spline based on DX displacement
yz_force_functions_linear: Y and Z translational stiffness of 5000 N/mm implemented
rotational_functions_200: Rotational stiffness of 200 N·mm/deg implemented
expectations.evidence: x/y/z_torque_function each use (-200.0 / 1D) * AX/AY/AZ(...) giving 200 N·mm/deg

expectations.text: mass_properties_uses_modify: Mass/inertia set with part modify rigid_body mass_properties, not part create
expectations.evidence: 'part modify rigid_body mass_properties' used for both chassis and subframe

expectations.text: dot_path_names: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy
expectations.evidence: All names use fully qualified paths such as .rubber_mount.chassis.cm, .rubber_mount.subframe.bush_i, etc.

expectations.text: no_adams_id: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: No occurrence of 'adams_id' found in bushing.cmd

expectations.text: no_center_of_mass_marker: center_of_mass_marker argument is NOT passed in any part modify mass_properties call
expectations.evidence: center_of_mass_marker is passed in both part modify calls: line 67 (.rubber_mount.chassis.cm) and line 116 (.rubber_mount.subframe.cm)

expectations.text: geometry_present: At least one geometry shape is added to each moving part
expectations.evidence: Ellipsoid geometry on chassis (chassis_ellips) and subframe (subframe_ellips)

expectations.text: adams_view_no_errors: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: No lines matching '^ERROR:' found in aview.log; script completed successfully
